title: [phase:simulate] [family:kernel-verification] [provider_hint:codex] Check current repo files AGENTS.md, scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh, scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh, scripts/harness/ci-agent-runner.sh, scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh, scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix...
summary_text: **Verdict** Partial compatibility only. The current repo supports bounded substitution of `claude` with `codex` in specific failover and proxy paths, but it does not support a full Kernel-style “Claude can always be substituted away” rule on the active FUGUE path. **What Already Works** - Hybrid is first-class: `claude` can remain main while `codex` is the execution provider, and AGENTS explicitly defines that split. See [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/AGENTS.md#L27) and [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/AGENTS.md#L31). - Failover to `codex` main is already part of the active contract when Claude is `degraded` or `exhausted`. See [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/AGENTS.md#L47) and [scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L609). - The local runner resolves requested providers through policy before building the lane matrix, so provider substitution is operational, not just documented. See [scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L607) and [scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L687). - The matrix builder can emit either `claude-main-orchestrator` or `codex-main-orchestrator`, and assist can be `claude`, `codex`, or `none`. See [scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh#L366) and [scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh#L379). - In the API harness, some Claude assist execution can be proxied through Codex when policy allows and strict direct-Claude guard is off. See [scripts/harness/ci-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/ci-agent-runner.sh#L236) and [scripts/harness/ci-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/ci-agent-runner.sh#L275). **What Is Forbidden or Still Incompatible** - Full substitution is forbidden by contract for MCP/control-plane work: MCP is Claude-exclusive in Hybrid and “never bridged through Codex.” See [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/AGENTS.md#L36) and [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/AGENTS.md#L39). - Codex-only failover is explicitly non-equivalent: MCP-dependent tasks are expected to fail and require manual retry. See [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/AGENTS.md#L47). - `claude-opus-assist` is not freely substitutable when strict/direct gates are active. Both runners fail closed if that lane is proxied, missing, or not directly executed by Claude. See [scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh#L921), [scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh#L1087), and [scripts/harness/ci-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/ci-agent-runner.sh#L775). - The vote aggregators still require real Claude participation in important cases. Complex/direct Claude-assist gates and the baseline trio gate (`codex` + `claude` + `glm`) can block execution if Claude is absent or unsuccessful. See [scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh#L120), [scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh#L205), [scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L903), and [scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L1003).
